title: add and then drop the same constraint...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, age Int32);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD CONSTRAINT age_check CHECK (age < 150);
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP CONSTRAINT age_check;
key_bug_features: adding and dropping the same constraint repeatedly
